name: Google Gemini
description: Registers Google Gemini as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Google Gemini API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Secondary fallback Google API key used when neither api_key nor GEMINI_API_KEY is configured.

settings.label: Google Gemini API key
settings.description: Google Gemini API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to GEMINI_API_KEY, then GOOGLE_API_KEY.

providers.name: Google Gemini
providers.description: Refreshes Google Gemini chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.

providers.name: Google Gemini Embeddings
providers.description: Embeds text through Gemini's native embeddings API for Metidos vector search.
